images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, radiating a vintage nostalgic mood amidst a tropical waterfall setting. She is dressed in a form-fitting, sexy Chanel-style tweed suit, the textured fabric hugging her slim waist and ample curves, unbuttoned slightly to reveal a hint of lace underneath. Bathed in bright, clear golden hour sunlight, her flawless skin texture glows with visible pores and faint vellus hair. She is captured in a natural, candid moment of laughing joy, head thrown back, large expressive eyes crinkling with mirth, straight black silky hair cascading over her shoulders. The background is a lush, dreamy fairy tale forest with a rushing waterfall, artistically blurred with bokeh to focus on her. The scene is uniquely graded with cyberpunk neon purple and blue tones overlaying the natural light, creating a surreal, high-fashion contrast. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
